name: Central Maine Power (ME)
_note: Avangrid CMP. Real data backend is a public Esri ArcGIS MapServer (federated by the Maine GeoLibrary, arcgis.com item 1d8d28803cd34b63aed57f91446bcfaf). PARKED disabled because: (1) the esriemcs.com host is blocked by this dev environment's egress policy, so it could not be introspected/verified here; (2) the field names below are UNVERIFIED placeholders. To enable: from an esriemcs-reachable host, GET the layer metadata (.../MapServer/0?f=json), set config.fields.{out,etr,id,name} to the real fields, confirm via check_reconciliation, then remove this flag. The portal page (portal.cmpco.com) is bot-walled, but this ArcGIS endpoint is not.
